The issue is based on branch 3.7.

### Browser name and version

_No response_

### Jupyter notebook / Jupyter Lab version

_No response_

### Expected behavior

Some highlight is done by `python` lexer and `python-console` lexer would be more appropriate because the code sample is a copy-paste from python interpreter.

### Observed behavior

When changing to `python-console`, the highlighting will be better in such cases.

### Example code

```Python
Every sample codes starting with `>>> ` should be modified.
```


### Stack traceback or browser console output

_No response_

{"action":"opened","number":14138,"pull_request":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/bokeh/bokeh/pulls/14138","id":2159780708,"node_id":"PR_kwDOADqB3M6Au6Nk","html_url":"https://github.com/bokeh/bokeh/pull/14138","diff_url":"https://github.com/bokeh/bokeh/pull/14138.diff","patch_url":"https://github.com/bokeh/bokeh/pull/14138.patch","issue_url":"https://api.github.com/repos/bokeh/bokeh/issues/14138","number":14138,"state":"open","locked":false,"title":"fix: highlight with python-console when needed","user":{"login":"sblondon","id":1708780,"node_id":"MDQ6VXNlcjE3MDg3ODA=","avatar_url":"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/1708780?v=4","gravatar_id":"","url":"https://api.github.com/users/sblondon","html_url":"https://github.com/sblondon","followers_url":"https://api.github.com/users/sblondon/followers","following_url":"https://api.github.com/users/sblondon/following{/other_user}","gists_url":"https://api.github.com/users/sblondon/gists{/gist_id}","starred_url":"https://api.github.com/users/sblondon/starred{/owner}{/repo}","subscriptions_url":"https://api.github.com/users/sblondon/subscriptions","organizations_url":"https://api.github.com/users/sblondon/orgs","repos_url":"https://api.github.com/users/sblondon/repos","events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/sblondon/events{/privacy}","received_events_url":"https://api.github.com/users/sblondon/received_events","type":"User","user_view_type":"public","site_admin":false},"body":"The [`python-console`](https://pygments.org/docs/lexers/#pygments.lexers.python.PythonConsoleLexer) lexer (or `pycon`) should be used when displaying interpreter output instead of [`python`](https://pygments.org/docs/lexers/#pygments.lexers.python.PythonLexer) lexer. `python` is for source code.

By fixing it, the highlighting in the documentation would be better.

The PR is the same change every lines. There are still python highlighting in the documentation because they are really source code examples.

- [ ] issues: fixes #14137
- [ ] tests added / passed
- [ ] release document entry (if new feature or API change)

PythonConsole:
![python-console-lexer](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/d2d27f50-13e1-4e1f-a5a1-bd91a6880648)

Python:
![python-lexer](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/fd445e61-f487-4681-a6c9-de17fc8cbce9)


I've done them with the [demo of pygments website](https://pygments.org/demo/).
To be fair, IMO, the `Python` highlight mode is better on the previous example.

The screenshots you provided shows only source code without output. It could be better to keep `python` lexer and remove `>>> ` and `... ` characters. There are others source code without output (in [auto.py](https://github.com/bokeh/bokeh/blob/branch-3.7/src/bokeh/core/property/auto.py#L50), [color.py](https://github.com/bokeh/bokeh/blob/e0ac1c790f768f460ef1b7ea764d353281035915/src/bokeh/core/property/color.py#L104), [either.py](https://github.com/bokeh/bokeh/blob/e0ac1c790f768f460ef1b7ea764d353281035915/src/bokeh/core/property/either.py#L61), etc.)

Do you talk about [sphinx-toggleprompt](https://pypi.org/project/sphinx-toggleprompt/)? Does bokeh will use it in the future?

FYI, my PR has been motivated by [this issue](https://pygments.org/demo/) on pygments.","reactions":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/bokeh/bokeh/issues/comments/2458256648/reactions","total_count":0,"+1":0,"-1":0,"laugh":0,"hooray":0,"confused":0,"heart":0,"rocket":0,"eyes":0},"performed_via_github_app":null}}
